summary: This release delivers cleaner citation previews, resolves temporal filtering and UI display bugs, and introduces clearer scope notifications when search filters expand.

entries.title: Restored time-based query filtering
entries.description: Queries specifying temporal constraints (such as 'last 6 months') now correctly filter by document publication dates, resolving an issue where the full, unfiltered documentation corpus was returned instead.

entries.title: Scrollable citation panel for large source lists
entries.description: Fixed an issue that prevented users from scrolling through the citation panel on smaller screens when more than six sources were returned.

entries.title: Reliable rendering of follow-up suggestions
entries.description: Follow-up question suggestions now automatically retry loading if they are temporarily interrupted, ensuring recommended next steps consistently display even during rapid back-to-back searches.

entries.title: Cleaner citation previews with stripped headers
entries.description: Citation previews in the side panel now display actual document body text rather than repetitive structural headers and file paths, making it easier to quickly evaluate source relevance.

entries.title: Deduplicated citations for multi-version documentation
entries.description: The citation panel now automatically collapses duplicate topics across multiple product versions to show only the most recent source, significantly reducing clutter and redundant entries.

entries.title: Scope notifications for fallback search results
entries.description: When a highly filtered query returns zero results and falls back to a broader search, a notification now clearly informs you that the results span multiple products or time periods.

entries.title: Elevated initial response generation latency
entries.description: Average response times currently range between 18 to 28 seconds due to backend processing limits while we work on introducing response streaming.

entries.title: Version-specific filtering unavailable for Cortex XSIAM
entries.description: Searching for specific XSIAM version numbers will trigger a fallback notification, as XSIAM documentation is organized by calendar date rather than version.

entries.title: Limited documentation coverage for Cortex AgentiX
entries.description: Because Cortex AgentiX is a newly launched platform, queries may temporarily pull from general Cortex XSOAR documentation when specific AgentiX resources are unavailable.

entries.title: Progressive response streaming
entries.description: An experimental feature to stream text progressively as it is generated is planned to significantly reduce the perceived wait time for search responses.
